text: Why did Jenny want to leave the wedding reception?
zh: 为什么珍妮想离开婚礼招待会?

text: Jeremy Hampden has a large circle of friends and is very popular at parties.
zh: 杰里米·汉普登交游广阔,在聚会上很受欢迎。

text: Everybody admires him for his great sense of humour--everybody, that is, except his six-year-old daughter, Jenny.
zh: 大家都很欣赏他极佳的幽默感——几乎人人如此,只有一个例外,那就是他六岁的女儿珍妮。

text: Recently, one of Jeremy's closest friends asked him to make a speech at a wedding reception.
zh: 最近,杰里米的一位密友请他在婚礼招待会上致辞。

text: This is the sort of thing that Jeremy loves.
zh: 这正是杰里米最喜欢做的事。

text: He prepared the speech carefully and went to the wedding with Jenny.
zh: 他认真准备了讲话稿,带着珍妮一起去参加婚礼。

text: He had included a large number of funny stories in the speech and, of course, it was a great success.
zh: 他在讲话中加入了许多有趣的故事,当然,效果非常成功。

text: As soon as he had finished Jenny told him she wanted to go home.
zh: 他刚一讲完,珍妮就告诉他她想回家了。

text: Jeremy was a little disappointed by this but he did as his daughter asked.
zh: 杰里米对此有点失望,但还是依了女儿的要求。

text: On the way home, he asked Jenny if she had enjoyed the speech.
zh: 回家的路上,他问珍妮是否喜欢他的讲话。

text: To his surprise she said she hadn't.
zh: 让他吃惊的是,她说她并不喜欢。

text: Jeremy asked her why this was so and she told him that she did not like to see so many people laughing at him!
zh: 杰里米问她为什么,她说她不喜欢看到那么多人嘲笑他!
